title: eriogonum × blissianum
intro: Eriogonum × blissianum, also known as Bliss' buckwheat or desert buckwheat, is a hybrid plant species within the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that may help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Eriogonum × blissianum are said to include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties that can aid in the treatment of various infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can be used topically to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
